patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/expression/reference/doc/lucene/SourceParser.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import java.math.BigDecimal;', 'import java.math.BigInteger;', 'case VALUE_NUMBER -> isUndefined(type) ? numberValue(parser.numberValue()) : parseByType(parser, type);', '/**', "* For the undefined case, Number's concrete types is guessed by the parser.", '* ParserBase.getNumberValue always returns BigInteger for integral big numbers.', '* We must use BigDecimal for NUMERIC even for integral values, otherwise streaming will be broken.', '* @param number is a Number returned by the parser.', '*/', 'private static Number numberValue(Number number) {', 'if (number instanceof BigInteger bigInt) {', 'return new BigDecimal(bigInt);', '}', 'return number;', '}', '', ''], removed_lines=['case VALUE_NUMBER -> isUndefined(type) ? parser.numberValue() : parseByType(parser, type);'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
